sql_array: CREATE TABLE replication_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, location GEOMETRY NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO replication_data (id, location, status) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 2)'), 'ACTIVE');
INSERT INTO replication_data (id, location, status) VALUES (2, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(2 3)'), 'ACTIVE');
INSERT INTO replication_data (id, location, status) VALUES (3, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(3 4)'), 'INACTIVE');
SELECT * FROM replication_data WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND ST_Within(location, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 4 0, 4 4, 0 4, 0 0))'));
SELECT id, status FROM replication_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM replication_data WHERE status IS NOT NULL) AND ST_Within(location, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((1 1, 2 1, 2 2, 1 2, 1 1))'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id FROM replication_data WHERE ST_Within(location, ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING(0 0, 1 1)')) GROUP BY status HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS derived_table;
SELECT (SELECT repl_disconnect('demo-srv') WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM replication_data WHERE status = 'ACTIVE')) AS disconnect_status;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (point_location GEOMETRY NOT NULL);
SELECT CASE WHEN ST_Within((SELECT point_location FROM temp_data LIMIT 1), ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 2 0, 2 2, 0 2, 0 0))')) THEN 'WITHIN' ELSE 'OUTSIDE' END AS spatial_status;
SELECT repl_disconnect((SELECT status FROM replication_data WHERE status LIKE '%ACTIVE%')) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT id FROM replication_data WHERE location IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id FROM replication_data WHERE ST_Within(location, (SELECT ST_Envelope(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 2 0, 2 2, 0 2, 0 0))'))));
SELECT repl_disconnect('demo-srv') WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM replication_data) > 0;
ALTER TABLE replication_data ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
UPDATE replication_data SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE ST_Within(location, ST_Buffer(ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)'), 1));
